reviews.text: We hired Brenda Colwell Photography to take our son's Senior pictures.  We were so pleased with the entire process. The "magic" in a portrait seems to be in getting the emotion to come through along with the great visual.  Within minutes she had him relaxed and captured his personality perfectly. We had our proofs in a timely manner and the final results were breathtaking and we will treasure them forever.  We have already booked  another session for our upcoming Senior.

I had planned to have my wedding in Colorado last July, and I had chosen Brenda to be our photographer. We loved her photos, and when we went up to meet with her, we felt that she was a reputable photographer with a strong understanding of family values. 25 days before our wedding, I contracted a virus that left me fully paralyzed with respiratory failure in ICU for 3 1/2 weeks. My husband and father were left with the horrific task of deciding to postpone our wedding and cancel my family's travel plans. When it came time to contact Brenda, she informed my father that she had passed up a bigger opportunity, because she had already committed to our ceremony, and was thus entitled to keep the deposit. When I was finally released from the hospital, I contacted Brenda and throughout the conversation she was completely unsympathetic to our story. She compared her missing out on photographing a larger wedding in Telluride to my missing my wedding, because I was on life support. Our conversation came to an abrupt end when she began to accuse me of making up my illness to get my of my wedding. I am still appalled at how the situation was handled. I hugely misjudged her character. I would never recommend Brenda as a photographer to anyone based on this experience.

Brenda is one of Telluride’s most beloved local talents. The “go to” of choice for portraits and events. As a resident who loves and truly sees the beauty in the mountains she calls home she brings that emotion to her photography. She is a wonderful mom and dog lover. Her affection for and connection with the families she photographs plays a vital role in the lovely way she captures the style and character of each and every one of her subjects. Two thumbs way up to BCP!

Brenda Colwell is simply the best!  People are willing to fly across the country to get photographed by Brenda.  We still get comments about a  Holiday Card from 10 years ago and we're proud to say it's from Photography by Brenda Colwell.

Brenda's passion, profesionalism and easy going manner assure a fun and successful photo shoot.   If you want a photographer to capture great moments that you will enjoy for a lifetime, this is the place to go in Telluride.
